sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Long Beach, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Long Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Long Beach housing market; Long Beach real estate market update; Long Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Long Beach; Long Beach home selling market; Long Beach homes for sale inventory; Long Beach days on market; Long Beach listing price; Long Beach seller market; Long Beach housing market 2026; Long Beach market update sellers; Long Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Long Beach; is now a good time to sell in Long Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
